heading: Prerequisites
body:
To create synthetic data by using the steps in this tutorial, you must:

- Create an Atlas cluster to load data into. To learn more,
  see [Cluster Types](create-new-database-deployment).

- [Install Node, NPM, and the MongoDB Node.js Driver](node/quick-start/download-and-install).

- Install [faker.js](https://github.com/faker-js/faker):

  ```
  npm install --save-dev @faker-js/faker
  ```
